Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: left;">Hjernen er Norges<br/> store helseutfordring</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

<h6><a href="http://www.hjerneradet.no/?page_id=30774"><span style="color: #5c5c5c;">Hva er hjernehelse ➔</span></a></h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h4 to h6

<h6 style="text-align: right;"><a href="https://www.hjerneradet.no/nyheter-arkiv/"><strong>Nyhetsarkivet finner du her…</strong></a></h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h5 instead of h6

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<div class="row inline-row footer-widget-area" role="complementary"> <div class="widget inline-column col-md-3 col-sm-6 col-xs-12 count-5 widget_media_image" id="media_image-2"><img alt="" class="imag
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="gem-button gem-button-size-tiny gem-button-style-flat gem-button-text-weight-normal gem-button-no-uppercase" data-ll-effect="drop-right-without-wrap" href="#" onmouseenter="" onmouseleave=""
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5><strong><span style="color: #000000;">NYHETSARKIV:</span></strong></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseenter without keyboard equivalent

<a class="gem-button gem-button-size-tiny gem-button-style-flat gem-button-text-weight-normal gem-button-no-uppercase" data-ll-effect="drop-right-without-wrap" href="#" onmouseenter="" onmouseleave=""
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has onmouseleave without keyboard equivalent

<a class="gem-button gem-button-size-tiny gem-button-style-flat gem-button-text-weight-normal gem-button-no-uppercase" data-ll-effect="drop-right-without-wrap" href="#" onmouseenter="" onmouseleave=""
Add keyboard event handlers (onfocus, onblur, onkeydown) for equivalent functionality

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'searchform' appears 2 times

id="searchform"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<div class="row inline-row footer-widget-area" role="complementary"> <div class="widget inline-column col-md-3 col-sm-6 col-xs-12 count-5 widget_media_image" id="media_image-2"><img alt="" class="imag
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="gem-button gem-button-size-tiny gem-button-style-flat gem-button-text-weight-normal gem-button-no-uppercase" data-ll-effect="drop-right-without-wrap" href="#" onmouseenter="" onmouseleave=""
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Om Hjernerådet - Hjernerådet

https://www.hjerneradet.no/home-3/
Avvik: 28 | Bestått: 66
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-6 page-parent wp-theme-thegem wp-child-theme-thegem-child wpb-js-composer js-comp-ver-8.6.1 vc_responsive"> <script type="text/javascript">
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4>Om Hjernerådet</h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

Video has no captions track

<video controls="controls" height="100%" poster="https://www.hjerneradet.no/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/forside-video.png" preload="none" src="http://www.hjerneradet.no/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/moove

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="site-navigation primary-navigation" id="primary-navigation" role="navigation"> <button class="menu-toggle dl-trigger">Primary Menu<span class="menu-line-1"></span><span class="menu-line-2"
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<div class="row inline-row footer-widget-area" role="complementary"> <div class="widget inline-column col-md-3 col-sm-6 col-xs-12 count-5 widget_media_image" id="media_image-2"><img alt="" class="imag
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a class="gem-button gem-button-size-tiny gem-button-style-flat gem-button-text-weight-normal gem-button-no-uppercase" data-ll-effect="drop-right-without-wrap" href="#" onmouseenter="" onmouseleave=""
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
